title: Junw 4 pack Clear Compartment Trays with 6 Section, Reusable Plastic Trays and Platters for Parties, 12" Serving Tray Perfect for Appetizers Snacks, Veggie, Candy, Fruit & Nut
features: ELEGENT AND DURABLE: Add a touch of elegance and refinement to your table with our party serving trays and platters, Our focus is to add the best luxurious look to your table with our clear serving platters and trays for parties.

HIGH QUALITY & HEALTHY: Our 6 compartment trays are made from hard Heavyweight plastic, which makes them break-resistant and durable. the clear divided serving platter is Crafted from food-safe plastic that is non-toxic BPA-free and smell free.

REUSABLE: Our clear plastic serving trays and platters can be used for all kind of foods as nuts, snacks, veggies with sauce, fruits etc. and If you prefer to reuse these clear party platter you can just wash them easily and set them like new for the next party.

GREAT VALUE: These 4-clear serving trays and platters pack ensures convenience, perfect for gatherings or daily use. Never run out of sectioned serving platters for serving food, stay prepared to serve with ease. Enjoy flexibility and style with this convenient supply.

SALES SERVICE: We value our customers and your shopping experience are very important to us. If you have any unpleasant experience with our clear disposable serving trays and platters, please feel free to contact us. We insure 100% satisfaction.
